title: IDF Airstrikes Kill 3 Palestinians in Gaza City's Zeitoun Neighborhood
detail: Israeli airstrikes killed at least three Palestinians and wounded two others in Gaza City's Zeitoun neighborhood on March 30 as the IDF stated it had targeted a Hamas armed cell. The dead and wounded were transferred to Al-Shifa and Al-Ahli hospitals. The strikes occurred amid continued low-level IDF operations inside Gaza despite the October 2025 ceasefire remaining nominally in place. Total Palestinians killed since the ceasefire reached at least 691 as reported by the Gaza Ministry of Health.

sources.name: Haaretz — Israeli Fire Kills Six in Gaza and West Bank, March 30, 2026
Gaza Ministry of Health — Daily casualty update, March 30, 2026

media.caption: IDF airstrikes kill 3 Palestinians in Gaza City's Zeitoun neighborhood

title: IDF Shoots and Kills Three Palestinians in West Bank on Palestine Land Day
detail: Israeli forces killed three Palestinians in the occupied West Bank on March 30 — the 50th anniversary of Palestine Land Day. Near Hebron, IDF soldiers fatally shot Ramzi Abdul Hakim Mohammed Al-Awawdeh, 22; Palestinian witnesses and medics said Israeli soldiers prevented emergency medical personnel from reaching him. Near Tulkarm, soldiers shot a Palestinian man after he allegedly drove his vehicle toward troops; the man was pronounced dead. In a third incident, a 15-year-old boy was shot and killed during a military raid on Dheisheh refugee camp near Bethlehem, which the Israeli military said followed a 'violent riot' involving stone-throwing. The three killings brought the total West Bank Palestinian death toll since October 7, 2023 to at least 1,136. Land Day — marking the 1976 Israeli confiscation of Palestinian land and the killing of six Arab citizens of Israel during protests — was observed across Palestinian communities amid heightened IDF presence.

sources.name: Haaretz — Israeli Fire Kills Six in Gaza and West Bank, March 30, 2026
Al Jazeera — Palestine Land Day coverage, March 30, 2026

media.caption: IDF shoots and kills three Palestinians in West Bank

title: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Wound 10 Israelis on Day 31 of Iran War; IDF Conducts 230 Strikes on Iran
detail: Iranian ballistic missiles struck Israel on March 30 — Day 31 of the US-Israel war on Iran — wounding at least 10 Israelis. Israeli air defense systems including Arrow 2/3 and David's Sling were activated; some projectiles were intercepted, but at least one missile impact wounded the 10 lightly. The IDF announced it had conducted approximately 230 strikes on Iranian regime military and infrastructure facilities in the preceding 24-hour period, its most intensive single-day air campaign against Iran since the conflict began February 28. Human Rights Watch confirmed on March 30 that Iran had used cluster munitions in at least three attacks on Israeli population centers — including strikes on Yehud (March 9) and Ramat Gan (March 18) — killing Israeli civilians. HRW called the cluster munition use unlawful under international humanitarian law.

sources.name: Human Rights Watch — Iran Unlawful Cluster Munition Strikes on Israel, March 30, 2026
Times of Israel — Iran war Day 31 liveblog, March 30, 2026

media.caption: Iranian ballistic missiles wound 10 Israelis on day 31 of Iran war

title: Israeli Strikes Kill Journalists, UNIFIL Peacekeepers in Lebanon; Netanyahu Orders Security Zone Expansion
detail: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon on March 30 killed three journalists in a marked press vehicle and killed two UNIFIL (UN peacekeeping) personnel in two separate incidents — one at a UN position near Adchit al-Qusayr and another in Bani Hayyan — and wounded a third UNIFIL peacekeeper critically. Israeli strikes also targeted a school and four ambulances in Hanaway village in the Tyre district. One Lebanese soldier was killed and five wounded at an army checkpoint. The Lebanese Health Ministry confirmed nine people killed in Lebanon in the preceding 24 hours. Four IDF soldiers were killed in ground operations in southern Lebanon, with funerals held March 31. PM Netanyahu ordered further expansion of Israel's 'security zone' in southern Lebanon; Defense Minister Israel Katz threatened to demolish all houses in Lebanese border villages 'like in Rafah and Beit Hanoun.' Cumulative casualties in Lebanon since the March 2 Israeli incursion reached 1,247 dead and 3,680 wounded; 200,000+ people displaced.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Lebanon front, March 30, 2026
UN OCHA — Humanitarian Situation Report, March 30, 2026

title: Palestine Land Day 50th Anniversary Marked Amid Escalating Settler Violence and Iranian Missile War
detail: March 30, 2026 marked the 50th anniversary of Palestine Land Day — the date in 1976 when six Arab citizens of Israel were killed by Israeli security forces during protests against mass land confiscation in the Galilee. In 2026, the anniversary was observed under the shadow of ongoing Israeli operations in Gaza and Lebanon, an active US-Israel war on Iran, and a documented surge in settler violence. Hundreds of Palestinians demonstrated near Hebron, Ramallah, and Nablus; Israeli forces used tear gas and stun grenades at several confrontations. Palestinian leaders invoked the anniversary to highlight what they described as accelerating land confiscation — citing UN OHCHR's March 2026 report documenting 36,973 settlement housing units approved in East Jerusalem and 27,200 in the rest of the West Bank in one year, alongside 84 new outposts and 36,000+ forcibly displaced Palestinians.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Palestine Land Day 50 years on, March 30, 2026
UN OHCHR — West Bank Settlement Report, March 2026

media.caption: Palestine Land Day 50th anniversary marked amid escalating settler violence
